lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing here? Shouldn't you be looking after your glider?

lines.speaker: Captain Daerkin
lines.text: I'm pretty much retired these days old fellow. My test piloting days are over. I'm just relaxing here and enjoying the primal clash between man and man.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're watching the duels then. Are you going to challenge someone yourself?

lines.speaker: Captain Daerkin
lines.text: I do find the duels entertaining to watch, but I suspect that actually being involved would be a lot less fun for me. I'm a lover, not a fighter!

lines.speaker: Captain Daerkin
lines.text: Excellent. Just what I need whilst watching the duels.

lines.speaker: Captain Daerkin
lines.text: Here you go, have a dashing pilot's scarf.

lines.speaker: Captain Daerkin
lines.text: I have some spare goggles, you might as well have them.

lines.speaker: Captain Daerkin
lines.text: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
